_meta.description: Data shapes for the Territory map screen. Zones are polygon regions drawn by the org. Site markers are point pins. History strip is a read-only aggregate. Six months of zone data with verified collections inside it = plastic credit application foundation.

CollectionZone._description: Operational polygon. Drawn on-map by dragging — never entered as text coordinates. Linked to market orders and collection handoffs. The spatial evidence layer.
CollectionZone.label: string — org-assigned name, e.g. Route A — Laini Saba, Mathare North Circuit

polygon.coordinates: array<GeoPoint> — ordered boundary vertices. Minimum 3 points to close polygon.

centroid.lat: number — computed on save, used for map label placement

polygon.areaEstimateSqm: number | null — computed from polygon area

CollectionZone.materialTypes: array<string> — material types collected in this zone. Linked to active market orders with matching material types.
CollectionZone.linkedOrderIds: array<string> — marketOrder IDs whose zone covers include this zoneId
CollectionZone.color: string | null — hex, org can assign a colour per zone for map differentiation

stats.activeMonths: number — count of calendar months with at least one verified collection

creditEligibility.thresholdMet: boolean — true when activeMonths >= 6 and totalKgVerified >= platform minimum
creditEligibility.plasticCreditEligibleKg: number — verified kg eligible for credit issuance

SiteMarker._description: Point pin on the territory map — distinct from zone polygons. Three types: processing hub, drop-off point, active collection site.
SiteMarker.label: string — e.g. Kibera Hub, Laini Saba Drop-off

location.lat: number — GPS captured, not manually entered

hub_specific.currentBuyPrices: map<string, number> — materialType to KSh/kg. Displayed to collectors approaching the hub.
hub_specific.mpesaPaybill: string | null — for collectors paid at hub

dropOff_specific.linkedHubId: string | null — hub that this drop-off feeds into

TerritoryHistoryEntry._description: Append-only audit log of territorial activity. Feeds the history strip. Never edited, only created.
TerritoryHistoryEntry.eventType: enum: zone_created | zone_updated | zone_deactivated | site_added | site_updated | collection_verified | zone_credit_threshold_met
TerritoryHistoryEntry.label: string — human-readable description of the event

CollectionZoneMapVM._description: Shape consumed by the Google Maps polygon renderer and the zone info bottom sheet.
CollectionZoneMapVM.label: string
CollectionZoneMapVM.fillColor: Color — AppTheme.primary.withOpacity(0.18), or org-assigned colour at same opacity

infoSheet._description: Data shown in DraggableScrollableSheet when polygon is tapped.
infoSheet.label: string
infoSheet.totalKgLabel: string — e.g. 1.4t verified or 840 kg verified
infoSheet.lastCollectionLabel: string | null — e.g. Last collection: 2 days ago
infoSheet.creditEligibilityLabel: string — e.g. 4 of 6 months active or Credit eligible

SiteMarkerMapVM._description: Shape consumed by the Google Maps marker renderer.
SiteMarkerMapVM.label: string

markerStyle.hue: double — BitmapDescriptor hue value. Hub: hueYellow(60). Drop-off: hueCyan(180). Collection: hueGreen(120).
markerStyle.icon: BitmapDescriptor — loaded from asset or defaultMarkerWithHue

SiteMarkerMapVM.infoWindowSnippet: string | null — e.g. Accepts: PET, Carrier Bags · 6am–3pm

TerritoryStatBarVM._description: The floating top info bar on the Territory screen.
TerritoryStatBarVM.lastUpdatedLabel: string — e.g. Updated 2h ago or Never updated

TerritoryHistoryStripVM._description: The three-item horizontal strip floating at the bottom of the Territory screen.

EnvTerritoryScreenState._description: Local state for the Territory screen.
EnvTerritoryScreenState.selectedZoneId: string | null — zone tapped, triggers info sheet
EnvTerritoryScreenState.isDrawingZone: boolean — true when draw zone flow is active
EnvTerritoryScreenState.draftPolygonPoints: array<LatLng> — points tapped during zone drawing

addSiteSheet._description: State for the Add Site bottom sheet.
addSiteSheet.label: string

MapConfiguration._description: Canopy map style — applied via GoogleMapController.setMapStyle() on map creation. Suppresses Google POIs, warms the colour palette.
MapConfiguration.kCanopyMapStyle: string — JSON string. Key overrides: featureType:poi visibility:off, featureType:landscape.natural color:#C8DCCA, featureType:water color:#A8C5C0, featureType:road.highway color:#E8E0D0, featureType:road.local color:#F0EBE0, background:#F5F1EB
